free_text: Activation cross section measurements at neutron
energy from 13.3 MeV to 15.0 MeV for 84Sr, 113In,
Hf: enriched samples; Sr and In: natural samples
No information on source of uncertainties
The final results are in JAERI-1329 (EXFOR 22637).
